description: President Michelle Bachelet proposed a major tax reform in 2014 to fund education and reduce inequality. The reform faced intense backlash from the business sector but maintained support among the electorate, eventually passing after significant compromises.

key_events.description: Initial high support based on education reform promises.
Business associations launch 'Stop the Tax' PR campaign.
Economic slowdown creates doubt about tax implementation timing.
Final consensus agreement reached in Congress.

calibration_notes: Useful for observing the 'compromise' phase in financial legislation where support stabilizes despite institutional pushback.
